data.title: SiriusXM Controls Churn, Ends With 33 Million Total Subscribers
data.description: The recent financial results for Sirius XM Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: SIRI) for the first quarter of 2026 were positive despite a slight miss in earnings. The company demonstrated strong subscriber loyalty with quarterly sales reaching $2.091 billion, surpassing the analyst estimate of $2.070 billion. This also reflected an increase from the $2.068 billion reported in the same period last year. On the earnings side, Sirius XM reported 63 cents per share, falling short of the projected 67 cents but showing growth from the 59 cents per share from the previous year. Net income saw a significant 20% rise to $245 million, and adjusted EBITDA grew by 6% to $666 million. More details on this story are available for further reading.

data.title: ProQR Announces Nomination of Dr. Lykke Hinsch Gylvin to its Board of Directors
data.description: On April 30, 2026, ProQR Therapeutics N.V. revealed the appointment of Lykke Hinsch Gylvin, MD, EMBA, as a new member of its Board of Directors. ProQR, a company listed on Nasdaq under PRQR, operates in Leiden, Netherlands, and Cambridge, Massachusetts. Their focus lies on revolutionizing patient care with RNA therapies utilizing the Axiomer™ RNA editing technology. Lykke Hinsch Gylvin, who currently serves as the Chief Medical Officer and Head of Global Medicine at Boehringer Ingelheim, brings valuable expertise to the board.

data.title: Xryma Plc Releases 2025 Annual Report
data.description: Nicosia, Cyprus - Today, Xryma Plc, previously known as ISX Financial EU Plc, a prominent company offering regulated transactional banking, real-time payment solutions, and banking SaaS services, shared its 2025 Annual Report. The report sheds light on the Group's financial achievements and strategic developments in the past year.

data.title: red violet to Present at the 21st Annual Needham Technology, Media & Consumer Conference
data.description: Red Violet, Inc., a prominent analytics and information solutions provider listed on NASDAQ as RDVT, disclosed their participation in the upcoming 21st Annual Needham Technology, Media & Consumer Conference scheduled for May 12-14, 2026. During the conference, the company's Chief Executive Officer, Derek Dubner, and Chief Financial Officer, Dan MacLachlan, will conduct virtual presentations and oversee investor meetings specifically on May 14, 2026.

data.title: Skyline Builders Group Holding Ltd and Cove Kaz Capital Group LLC Announce Merger Agreement
data.description: A company called Kaz Resources from Astana, Kazakhstan, is planning to go public (IPO) in either the fourth quarter of 2026 or the first quarter of 2027 in New York. The company aims to supply the United States with essential minerals like tungsten, rare earths, and others.

data.title: Hadron Energy Secures U.S. Uranium Conversion Agreement with ConverDyn, Locking In Domestic Fuel Supply for the Halo Micro-Modular Reactor
data.description: New York-based Hadron Energy, Inc. revealed a significant development today by finalizing a Uranium Conversion Services Agreement with ConverDyn, GP, the exclusive marketing entity for the primary commercial uranium hexafluoride (UF₆) conversion facility in the U.S., managed by Solstice Advanced Materials (Nasdaq: SOLS). This pivotal Agreement marks a crucial milestone for Hadron’s Halo Micro-Modular Reactor (“MMR”) project in the domestic nuclear sector.

data.title: ASA Gold and Precious Metals Limited Announces Reauthorization of Share Repurchase Program
data.description: ASA Gold and Precious Metals Limited (NYSE: ASA) based in Portland, Maine, has revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a renewal of the share repurchase authorization for the Fund. The decision allows the Fund to buy back up to 5% of its total common shares starting from May 1, 2026, until April 30, 2027. The Fund is permitted to acquire its common shares at a reduced price compared to the Net Asset Value (NAV) through open market transactions during this period.

data.title: XCEL BRANDS announces sale of luxury fine jewelry brand Judith Ripka
data.description: Xcel Brands, a prominent media and consumer products company, recently disclosed the sale of luxury fine jewelry brand Judith Ripka. The transaction was announced on April 30, 2026, and involved Xcel Brands, identified on NASDAQ as XELB. Known for its expertise in creating influencer-based brands utilizing social commerce and live streaming platforms, Xcel Brands' decision regarding the luxury brand reflects strategic realignment within the industry.

data.title: Krystal Biotech to Present at Upcoming Scientific Conferences
data.description: Krystal Biotech, Inc. revealed today that they will showcase various programs at forthcoming scientific conferences in May and June. The company, listed as (NASDAQ: KRYS), will participate in multiple presentations at the events. This move signifies their active engagement in sharing insights and updates within the scientific community. The presentations are scheduled to take place in May and June, enhancing opportunities for interaction and knowledge sharing.
INmune Bio Inc. sets to reveal Q1 2026 financials & give corporate update on May 7th. Mark your calendars!

data.title: Lexicon Pharmaceuticals to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: A pharmaceutical company based in The Woodlands, Texas, Lexicon Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: LXRX), is set to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 7, 2026, before the market opens. The management team will host a conference call and a live webcast at 8:30 a.m. ET (7:30 a.m. CT) on the same day to delve into the financial outcomes and offer insights into the company's operations.
